skills.name: Shrink Body
skills.description: Shrink the size of monsters in front.
skills.effect_text:
Large-type-> Medium-type-> Small-type
Targets: CaptionRatio
Duration: CaptionTime seconds

skills.name: Swell Body
skills.description: Enlarges the size of nearby ally's body. Increases Maximum HP and Physical, Magic Defense of the target.
skills.effect_text:
Increases Maximum HP, Defense by CaptionRatio %
Duration: 30 seconds

skills.name: Swell Brain
skills.description: Increase Looting Chance by enlarging the size of your party members' and your heads momentarily. The more Looting chance increases, the more drop rate for unidentified equipment gets high.
skills.effect_text:
Increases Looting Chance by CaptionRatio
Duration: 30 minutes

skills.name: Quicken
skills.description: Temporarily increases basic attack speed, and the limit of your basic attack skill is removed.
skills.effect_text:
Attack Speed: + CaptionRatio
Duration: CaptionTime seconds

skills.name: Swell Hands
skills.description: Enlarges the size of your party members' and your both hands temporarily to increase Physical Attack and Magic Attack of you and your party members proportionally to the caster's basic Attack (Not applied to ATK increased by buff.)

skills.name: Transmute
skills.description: Randomly changes the appearance of the enemy and continuously damages. The longer the damage lasts, the more damage is applied.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x [Duration (seconds)] times
Duration: 5 seconds

attributes.name: Swell Brain: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases [Swell Brain]'s looting chance increasing effects by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Shrink Body: Nullify
attributes.description:
* Physical and Magic Attack of the target inflicted by [Shrink Body] decreases by 1% per attribute level

* Attack of the character and the boss monster decreases as well (The actual size of the body doesn't change)

* Increases SP consumption by 20%

attributes.name: Shrink Body: Additional Damage
attributes.description:
* Deals damage equal to 20% of your physical attack per attribute level when changing the enemy's size with [Shrink Body]

* Increases SP consumption by 30%

attributes.name: Reversi: Capture Only
attributes.description:
* Changes ally tiles to enemy tiles when using [Reversi]

* Activates when enemies are nearby

attributes.name: Swell Hands: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases [Swell Hands]'s increase attack effects by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: [Arts] Swell Brain: Physical
attributes.description: * [Swell Brain] no longer increases Looting Chance, but increases the STR and DEX of you and your party members by 10 per attribute level.

attributes.name: [Arts] Swell Brain: Magic
attributes.description: * [Swell Brain] no longer increases Looting Chance, but increases the INT and SPR of you and your party members by 10 per attribute level.

attributes.name: Transmute: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Transmute] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: [Arts] Transmute: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the skill factor of [Transmute] by 1.25% per attribute level
